issue.message: Invalid package reference in org.bouncycastle:bcprov-jdk18on; not included in Android: `javax.naming.directory`. Referenced from `org.bouncycastle.jce.provider.CrlCache`.
Invalid package reference in org.bouncycastle:bcprov-jdk18on; not included in Android: `javax.naming`. Referenced from `org.bouncycastle.jce.provider.X509LDAPCertStoreSpi`.
Invalid package reference in org.codelibs:jcifs; not included in Android: `javax.security.auth.kerberos`. Referenced from `org.codelibs.jcifs.smb.impl.Kerb5Authenticator`.
The `<application> com.sorrowblue.comicviewer.app.MainApplication` is not registered in the manifest
The `<application> com.sorrowblue.comicviewer.app.MainApplication` is not registered in the manifest
A newer version of Gradle than 9.3.1 is available: 9.4.1
